x-enumeration-literals.name: Syndicate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A syndicate is a temporary alliance formed by professionals to handle a large transaction that would be impossible to execute individually. https://www.investopedia.com/terms/s/syndicate.asp

A syndicate is a self-organizing group of individuals, companies, corporations or entities formed to transact some specific business, to pursue or promote a shared interest.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syndicate
